records.m_Talk_ENG: ...So, you're saying Laika used to be with the Mansion?
records.m_Talk_DEU: ...So, you're saying Laika used to be with the Mansion?
records.m_Talk_FRA: ...So, you're saying Laika used to be with the Mansion?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Hey, kid. Get your facts straight.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Hey, kid. Get your facts straight.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Hey, kid. Get your facts straight.

records.m_Talk_ENG: My stupid homeland sent us, just a bunch of kids, to the Mansion in the name of space exploration.
records.m_Talk_DEU: My stupid homeland sent us, just a bunch of kids, to the Mansion in the name of space exploration.
records.m_Talk_FRA: My stupid homeland sent us, just a bunch of kids, to the Mansion in the name of space exploration.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Back then, the Mansion was known for turning regular humans into Counter-like fighters through training and procedures.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Back then, the Mansion was known for turning regular humans into Counter-like fighters through training and procedures.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Back then, the Mansion was known for turning regular humans into Counter-like fighters through training and procedures.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Turning regular people into Counter-like ones? Is that even possible?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Turning regular people into Counter-like ones? Is that even possible?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Turning regular people into Counter-like ones? Is that even possible?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Don't be stupid. Of course not.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Don't be stupid. Of course not.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Don't be stupid. Of course not.

records.m_Talk_ENG: If it worked, TASKFORCEs wouldn't be wasting money recruiting real Counters.
records.m_Talk_DEU: If it worked, TASKFORCEs wouldn't be wasting money recruiting real Counters.
records.m_Talk_FRA: If it worked, TASKFORCEs wouldn't be wasting money recruiting real Counters.

records.m_Talk_ENG: You can mimic a Counter for a while with Master's special drug, but the effect is temporary.
records.m_Talk_DEU: You can mimic a Counter for a while with Master's special drug, but the effect is temporary.
records.m_Talk_FRA: You can mimic a Counter for a while with Master's special drug, but the effect is temporary.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Except for one person...
records.m_Talk_DEU: Except for one person...
records.m_Talk_FRA: Except for one person...

records.m_Talk_ENG: A maid named <color=#ffd34c>Veronica</color> was different.
records.m_Talk_DEU: A maid named <color=#ffd34c>Veronica</color> was different.
records.m_Talk_FRA: A maid named <color=#ffd34c>Veronica</color> was different.

records.m_Talk_ENG: I don't know what they did to her, but even Counter maids couldn't touch her.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I don't know what they did to her, but even Counter maids couldn't touch her.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I don't know what they did to her, but even Counter maids couldn't touch her.

records.m_Talk_ENG: The hag claimed she was the greatest Chief Maid in Mansion's history or whatever...
records.m_Talk_DEU: The hag claimed she was the greatest Chief Maid in Mansion's history or whatever...
records.m_Talk_FRA: The hag claimed she was the greatest Chief Maid in Mansion's history or whatever...

records.m_Talk_ENG: Ugh, whatever! I couldn't care less about maids anymore!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Ugh, whatever! I couldn't care less about maids anymore!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Ugh, whatever! I couldn't care less about maids anymore!

records.m_Talk_ENG: I'm a space explorer from the Northern Union! Not some Mansion flunky...!
records.m_Talk_DEU: I'm a space explorer from the Northern Union! Not some Mansion flunky...!
records.m_Talk_FRA: I'm a space explorer from the Northern Union! Not some Mansion flunky...!

records.m_Talk_ENG: From where I'm standing, it's all the same...
records.m_Talk_DEU: From where I'm standing, it's all the same...
records.m_Talk_FRA: From where I'm standing, it's all the same...

records.m_Talk_ENG: Snowmen or maids... they're both just bad guys.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Snowmen or maids... they're both just bad guys.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Snowmen or maids... they're both just bad guys.

records.m_Talk_ENG: No, they're not! At least the Northern Union never forced us to wear skimpy maid outfits into battle...!
records.m_Talk_DEU: No, they're not! At least the Northern Union never forced us to wear skimpy maid outfits into battle...!
records.m_Talk_FRA: No, they're not! At least the Northern Union never forced us to wear skimpy maid outfits into battle...!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Unlike those perverts...!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Unlike those perverts...!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Unlike those perverts...!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Perverts? Says the one wearing a skin-tight leotard under her uniform...
records.m_Talk_DEU: Perverts? Says the one wearing a skin-tight leotard under her uniform...
records.m_Talk_FRA: Perverts? Says the one wearing a skin-tight leotard under her uniform...

records.m_Talk_ENG: Huh? Hold on a sec. Then have you also worn a maid outfit too?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Huh? Hold on a sec. Then have you also worn a maid outfit too?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Huh? Hold on a sec. Then have you also worn a maid outfit too?

records.m_Talk_ENG: ...Shut it, kid.
records.m_Talk_DEU: ...Shut it, kid.
records.m_Talk_FRA: ...Shut it, kid.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Don't ask questions you don't wanna get hurt for.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Don't ask questions you don't wanna get hurt for.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Don't ask questions you don't wanna get hurt for.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Of course she has. The Mansion's maid uniform is a symbol of trust.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Of course she has. The Mansion's maid uniform is a symbol of trust.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Of course she has. The Mansion's maid uniform is a symbol of trust.

records.m_Talk_ENG: In espionage, assassination, abduction, terrorism, sabotage... trust is everything between the client and us.
records.m_Talk_DEU: In espionage, assassination, abduction, terrorism, sabotage... trust is everything between the client and us.
records.m_Talk_FRA: In espionage, assassination, abduction, terrorism, sabotage... trust is everything between the client and us.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Ugh, you just had to show up. You hag...!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Ugh, you just had to show up. You hag...!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Ugh, you just had to show up. You hag...!

records.m_Talk_ENG: A maid is someone who serves her master to do their bidding.
records.m_Talk_DEU: A maid is someone who serves her master to do their bidding.
records.m_Talk_FRA: A maid is someone who serves her master to do their bidding.

records.m_Talk_ENG: That is why Mansion agents serve their clients as masters.
records.m_Talk_DEU: That is why Mansion agents serve their clients as masters.
records.m_Talk_FRA: That is why Mansion agents serve their clients as masters.

records.m_Talk_ENG: And to make sure they're visible and accountable, they deliberately wear eye-catching maid outfits.
records.m_Talk_DEU: And to make sure they're visible and accountable, they deliberately wear eye-catching maid outfits.
records.m_Talk_FRA: And to make sure they're visible and accountable, they deliberately wear eye-catching maid outfits.

records.m_Talk_ENG: In the underworld, a maid uniform is proof that Mansion is involved, and that anonymity is guaranteed.
records.m_Talk_DEU: In the underworld, a maid uniform is proof that Mansion is involved, and that anonymity is guaranteed.
records.m_Talk_FRA: In the underworld, a maid uniform is proof that Mansion is involved, and that anonymity is guaranteed.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Loyalty and trust toward the client...
records.m_Talk_DEU: Loyalty and trust toward the client...
records.m_Talk_FRA: Loyalty and trust toward the client...

records.m_Talk_ENG: That's the secret to how Mansion has survived all this time.
records.m_Talk_DEU: That's the secret to how Mansion has survived all this time.
records.m_Talk_FRA: That's the secret to how Mansion has survived all this time.

records.m_Talk_ENG: So you're the Mansion Master?
records.m_Talk_DEU: So you're the Mansion Master?
records.m_Talk_FRA: So you're the Mansion Master?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Sysop said you'd be the one to explain our mission.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Sysop said you'd be the one to explain our mission.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Sysop said you'd be the one to explain our mission.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Hmm, your mission...
records.m_Talk_DEU: Hmm, your mission...
records.m_Talk_FRA: Hmm, your mission...

records.m_Talk_ENG: Let's see...
records.m_Talk_DEU: Let's see...
records.m_Talk_FRA: Let's see...

records.m_Talk_ENG: That scruffy weed over there, I've seen before...
records.m_Talk_DEU: That scruffy weed over there, I've seen before...
records.m_Talk_FRA: That scruffy weed over there, I've seen before...

records.m_Talk_ENG: And this bright-eyed new face... Yes, you must be F959licette. Louis959 Laurencin, right?
records.m_Talk_DEU: And this bright-eyed new face... Yes, you must be F959licette. Louis959 Laurencin, right?
records.m_Talk_FRA: And this bright-eyed new face... Yes, you must be F959licette. Louis959 Laurencin, right?

records.m_Talk_ENG: I saw the Gauntlet League. I'm actually a fan, Louis959.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I saw the Gauntlet League. I'm actually a fan, Louis959.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I saw the Gauntlet League. I'm actually a fan, Louis959.

records.m_Talk_ENG: May I have your autograph?
records.m_Talk_DEU: May I have your autograph?
records.m_Talk_FRA: May I have your autograph?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Huh!? You're a fan of mine?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Huh!? You're a fan of mine?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Huh!? You're a fan of mine?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Don't fall for it, kid.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Don't fall for it, kid.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Don't fall for it, kid.

records.m_Talk_ENG: She's two-faced trash.
records.m_Talk_DEU: She's two-faced trash.
records.m_Talk_FRA: She's two-faced trash.

records.m_Talk_ENG: I can hear you loud and clear, Bristlegrass.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I can hear you loud and clear, Bristlegrass.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I can hear you loud and clear, Bristlegrass.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Still, what a rare shade of blond hair. Soft and resilient.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Still, what a rare shade of blond hair. Soft and resilient.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Still, what a rare shade of blond hair. Soft and resilient.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Hmm... And your scent isn't bad either.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Hmm... And your scent isn't bad either.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Hmm... And your scent isn't bad either.

records.m_Talk_ENG: M-my scent...?!
records.m_Talk_DEU: M-my scent...?!
records.m_Talk_FRA: M-my scent...?!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Hey! Are you saying that I smell?!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Hey! Are you saying that I smell?!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Hey! Are you saying that I smell?!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Uhu huu. Even your angry face is adorable.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Uhu huu. Even your angry face is adorable.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Uhu huu. Even your angry face is adorable.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Still haven't matured enough, but with time, you could become just my type.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Still haven't matured enough, but with time, you could become just my type.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Still haven't matured enough, but with time, you could become just my type.

records.m_Talk_ENG: It is my duty as Master to nurture fresh young buds into elegant flowers.
records.m_Talk_DEU: It is my duty as Master to nurture fresh young buds into elegant flowers.
records.m_Talk_FRA: It is my duty as Master to nurture fresh young buds into elegant flowers.

records.m_Talk_ENG: So, Louis959, how about it? Would you like to try on a maid outfit?
records.m_Talk_DEU: So, Louis959, how about it? Would you like to try on a maid outfit?
records.m_Talk_FRA: So, Louis959, how about it? Would you like to try on a maid outfit?

records.m_Talk_ENG: I prepared something quite cute just for today.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I prepared something quite cute just for today.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I prepared something quite cute just for today.

records.m_Talk_ENG: A maid outfit...?
records.m_Talk_DEU: A maid outfit...?
records.m_Talk_FRA: A maid outfit...?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Back off, you pervy hag! Hands off the kid...!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Back off, you pervy hag! Hands off the kid...!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Back off, you pervy hag! Hands off the kid...!

records.m_Talk_ENG: She's still a minor, you know!
records.m_Talk_DEU: She's still a minor, you know!
records.m_Talk_FRA: She's still a minor, you know!

records.m_Talk_ENG: What are you saying? Flowers are meant to be nurtured while they're still young buds.
records.m_Talk_DEU: What are you saying? Flowers are meant to be nurtured while they're still young buds.
records.m_Talk_FRA: What are you saying? Flowers are meant to be nurtured while they're still young buds.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Fu fu, and you're still such a spoiled brat even after all this time.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Fu fu, and you're still such a spoiled brat even after all this time.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Fu fu, and you're still such a spoiled brat even after all this time.

records.m_Talk_ENG: I bet you missed my touch, didn't you? Still, try to be patient a little longer.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I bet you missed my touch, didn't you? Still, try to be patient a little longer.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I bet you missed my touch, didn't you? Still, try to be patient a little longer.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Right now, I'm talking to Louis959. Behave with proper manners as a maid should.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Right now, I'm talking to Louis959. Behave with proper manners as a maid should.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Right now, I'm talking to Louis959. Behave with proper manners as a maid should.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Once we're done here, I'll give you all the attention you've been craving... nice and slow.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Once we're done here, I'll give you all the attention you've been craving... nice and slow.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Once we're done here, I'll give you all the attention you've been craving... nice and slow.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Gah...! You sick freak!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Gah...! You sick freak!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Gah...! You sick freak!

records.m_Talk_ENG: You're seriously insane...!
records.m_Talk_DEU: You're seriously insane...!
records.m_Talk_FRA: You're seriously insane...!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Hey! Listen up, you damn hag!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Hey! Listen up, you damn hag!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Hey! Listen up, you damn hag!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Your goal is to get us to that branching point or whatever, right...?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Your goal is to get us to that branching point or whatever, right...?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Your goal is to get us to that branching point or whatever, right...?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Isn't that why you dragged us all the way out here? To train us for that mission?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Isn't that why you dragged us all the way out here? To train us for that mission?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Isn't that why you dragged us all the way out here? To train us for that mission?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Then quit messing around and start training us already!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Then quit messing around and start training us already!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Then quit messing around and start training us already!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Fu fu, that's pretty eager for a weed like you.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Fu fu, that's pretty eager for a weed like you.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Fu fu, that's pretty eager for a weed like you.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Your mouth's gotten even filthier since I last saw you. Maybe you need a bit of discipline.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Your mouth's gotten even filthier since I last saw you. Maybe you need a bit of discipline.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Your mouth's gotten even filthier since I last saw you. Maybe you need a bit of discipline.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Didn't I teach you that a proper maid always speaks with refinement, no matter the place?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Didn't I teach you that a proper maid always speaks with refinement, no matter the place?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Didn't I teach you that a proper maid always speaks with refinement, no matter the place?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Or are you just waiting for the punishment I'll give you...?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Or are you just waiting for the punishment I'll give you...?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Or are you just waiting for the punishment I'll give you...?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Pfft! Like I care about speaking properly...!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Pfft! Like I care about speaking properly...!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Pfft! Like I care about speaking properly...!

records.m_Talk_ENG: My life's already in the gutter. What good's a clean mouth gonna do?
records.m_Talk_DEU: My life's already in the gutter. What good's a clean mouth gonna do?
records.m_Talk_FRA: My life's already in the gutter. What good's a clean mouth gonna do?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Uhu huu. I've spent my life as Mansion Master, caring for children like you who were tossed aside.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Uhu huu. I've spent my life as Mansion Master, caring for children like you who were tossed aside.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Uhu huu. I've spent my life as Mansion Master, caring for children like you who were tossed aside.

records.m_Talk_ENG: So with one glance at a sprout, I know what kind of flower they will become.
records.m_Talk_DEU: So with one glance at a sprout, I know what kind of flower they will become.
records.m_Talk_FRA: So with one glance at a sprout, I know what kind of flower they will become.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Truly elegant flowers aren't bound by their environment.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Truly elegant flowers aren't bound by their environment.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Truly elegant flowers aren't bound by their environment.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Even if buried in filth, the ones meant to bloom will always find a way to open their petals.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Even if buried in filth, the ones meant to bloom will always find a way to open their petals.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Even if buried in filth, the ones meant to bloom will always find a way to open their petals.

records.m_Talk_ENG: So, which one do you think you are, Bristlegrass?
records.m_Talk_DEU: So, which one do you think you are, Bristlegrass?
records.m_Talk_FRA: So, which one do you think you are, Bristlegrass?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Beats me.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Beats me.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Beats me.

records.m_Talk_ENG: I'm a bullet. I just fly where the one pulling the trigger aims me.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I'm a bullet. I just fly where the one pulling the trigger aims me.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I'm a bullet. I just fly where the one pulling the trigger aims me.

records.m_Talk_ENG: It's always been that way. So what's supposed to change now?
records.m_Talk_DEU: It's always been that way. So what's supposed to change now?
records.m_Talk_FRA: It's always been that way. So what's supposed to change now?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Fu fu, I figured you'd say that.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Fu fu, I figured you'd say that.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Fu fu, I figured you'd say that.

records.m_Talk_ENG: But that's exactly why you're still nothing more than a weed.
records.m_Talk_DEU: But that's exactly why you're still nothing more than a weed.
records.m_Talk_FRA: But that's exactly why you're still nothing more than a weed.

records.m_Talk_ENG: What was that?
records.m_Talk_DEU: What was that?
records.m_Talk_FRA: What was that?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Up until now, as a bullet, you've left everything to that kid's choices...
records.m_Talk_DEU: Up until now, as a bullet, you've left everything to that kid's choices...
records.m_Talk_FRA: Up until now, as a bullet, you've left everything to that kid's choices...

records.m_Talk_ENG: But this time, she can't carry your burden for you.
records.m_Talk_DEU: But this time, she can't carry your burden for you.
records.m_Talk_FRA: But this time, she can't carry your burden for you.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Because for this mission, you won't be the bullet. You'll be the thorn.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Because for this mission, you won't be the bullet. You'll be the thorn.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Because for this mission, you won't be the bullet. You'll be the thorn.

records.m_Talk_ENG: A thorn that keeps the enemies away from that kid, no matter what.
records.m_Talk_DEU: A thorn that keeps the enemies away from that kid, no matter what.
records.m_Talk_FRA: A thorn that keeps the enemies away from that kid, no matter what.

records.m_Talk_ENG: A thorn? What's that supposed to mean?
records.m_Talk_DEU: A thorn? What's that supposed to mean?
records.m_Talk_FRA: A thorn? What's that supposed to mean?

records.m_Talk_ENG: As expected of a weed, still as slow-witted as ever.
records.m_Talk_DEU: As expected of a weed, still as slow-witted as ever.
records.m_Talk_FRA: As expected of a weed, still as slow-witted as ever.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Normally, she would take the lead with her shield and you'd cover the rear...
records.m_Talk_DEU: Normally, she would take the lead with her shield and you'd cover the rear...
records.m_Talk_FRA: Normally, she would take the lead with her shield and you'd cover the rear...

records.m_Talk_ENG: But in this mission, her Zoom Lens is crucial.
records.m_Talk_DEU: But in this mission, her Zoom Lens is crucial.
records.m_Talk_FRA: But in this mission, her Zoom Lens is crucial.

records.m_Talk_ENG: In other words, she can't use it as a shield like usual.
records.m_Talk_DEU: In other words, she can't use it as a shield like usual.
records.m_Talk_FRA: In other words, she can't use it as a shield like usual.

records.m_Talk_ENG: She can't use the Zoom Lens as a shield?
records.m_Talk_DEU: She can't use the Zoom Lens as a shield?
records.m_Talk_FRA: She can't use the Zoom Lens as a shield?

records.m_Talk_ENG: What do you mean?
records.m_Talk_DEU: What do you mean?
records.m_Talk_FRA: What do you mean?

records.m_Talk_ENG: That annoying rat will fill you in the details, Louis959.
records.m_Talk_DEU: That annoying rat will fill you in the details, Louis959.
records.m_Talk_FRA: That annoying rat will fill you in the details, Louis959.

records.m_Talk_ENG: As for me, I'll be spending the rest of the time making Bristlegrass at least somewhat useful.
records.m_Talk_DEU: As for me, I'll be spending the rest of the time making Bristlegrass at least somewhat useful.
records.m_Talk_FRA: As for me, I'll be spending the rest of the time making Bristlegrass at least somewhat useful.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Rat...?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Rat...?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Rat...?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Um, so I take the front and the kid covers the back...?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Um, so I take the front and the kid covers the back...?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Um, so I take the front and the kid covers the back...?

records.m_Talk_ENG: In Gauntlet terms, you're asking me to be a Striker?
records.m_Talk_DEU: In Gauntlet terms, you're asking me to be a Striker?
records.m_Talk_FRA: In Gauntlet terms, you're asking me to be a Striker?

records.m_Talk_ENG: A role swap... This sounds fun.
records.m_Talk_DEU: A role swap... This sounds fun.
records.m_Talk_FRA: A role swap... This sounds fun.

records.m_Talk_ENG: All right, let's do this!
records.m_Talk_DEU: All right, let's do this!
records.m_Talk_FRA: All right, let's do this!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Are you sure about this, Laika?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Are you sure about this, Laika?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Are you sure about this, Laika?

records.m_Talk_ENG: The weapons that you have really don't suit a Striker role.
records.m_Talk_DEU: The weapons that you have really don't suit a Striker role.
records.m_Talk_FRA: The weapons that you have really don't suit a Striker role.

records.m_Talk_ENG: I know.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I know.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I know.

records.m_Talk_ENG: But with these things, you figure it out as you go.
records.m_Talk_DEU: But with these things, you figure it out as you go.
records.m_Talk_FRA: But with these things, you figure it out as you go.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Fu fu, how adorable.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Fu fu, how adorable.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Fu fu, how adorable.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Bristlegrass is wagging her tail like she's having the time of her life.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Bristlegrass is wagging her tail like she's having the time of her life.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Bristlegrass is wagging her tail like she's having the time of her life.

records.m_Talk_ENG: But...
records.m_Talk_DEU: But...
records.m_Talk_FRA: But...

records.m_Talk_ENG: Let's see how it turns out.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Let's see how it turns out.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Let's see how it turns out.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Hmph! Don't underestimate me, hag!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Hmph! Don't underestimate me, hag!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Hmph! Don't underestimate me, hag!

records.m_Talk_ENG: I'm a League champion, okay? I'm not some maid cosplay trainee anymore!
records.m_Talk_DEU: I'm a League champion, okay? I'm not some maid cosplay trainee anymore!
records.m_Talk_FRA: I'm a League champion, okay? I'm not some maid cosplay trainee anymore!

root.m_Talk_ENG: ...So, you're saying Laika used to be with the Mansion?
root.m_Talk_DEU: ...So, you're saying Laika used to be with the Mansion?
root.m_Talk_FRA: ...So, you're saying Laika used to be with the Mansion?

root.m_Talk_ENG: Hey, kid. Get your facts straight.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Hey, kid. Get your facts straight.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Hey, kid. Get your facts straight.

root.m_Talk_ENG: My stupid homeland sent us, just a bunch of kids, to the Mansion in the name of space exploration.
root.m_Talk_DEU: My stupid homeland sent us, just a bunch of kids, to the Mansion in the name of space exploration.
root.m_Talk_FRA: My stupid homeland sent us, just a bunch of kids, to the Mansion in the name of space exploration.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Back then, the Mansion was known for turning regular humans into Counter-like fighters through training and procedures.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Back then, the Mansion was known for turning regular humans into Counter-like fighters through training and procedures.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Back then, the Mansion was known for turning regular humans into Counter-like fighters through training and procedures.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Turning regular people into Counter-like ones? Is that even possible?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Turning regular people into Counter-like ones? Is that even possible?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Turning regular people into Counter-like ones? Is that even possible?

root.m_Talk_ENG: Don't be stupid. Of course not.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Don't be stupid. Of course not.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Don't be stupid. Of course not.

root.m_Talk_ENG: If it worked, TASKFORCEs wouldn't be wasting money recruiting real Counters.
root.m_Talk_DEU: If it worked, TASKFORCEs wouldn't be wasting money recruiting real Counters.
root.m_Talk_FRA: If it worked, TASKFORCEs wouldn't be wasting money recruiting real Counters.

root.m_Talk_ENG: You can mimic a Counter for a while with Master's special drug, but the effect is temporary.
root.m_Talk_DEU: You can mimic a Counter for a while with Master's special drug, but the effect is temporary.
root.m_Talk_FRA: You can mimic a Counter for a while with Master's special drug, but the effect is temporary.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Except for one person...
root.m_Talk_DEU: Except for one person...
root.m_Talk_FRA: Except for one person...

root.m_Talk_ENG: A maid named <color=#ffd34c>Veronica</color> was different.
root.m_Talk_DEU: A maid named <color=#ffd34c>Veronica</color> was different.
root.m_Talk_FRA: A maid named <color=#ffd34c>Veronica</color> was different.

root.m_Talk_ENG: I don't know what they did to her, but even Counter maids couldn't touch her.
root.m_Talk_DEU: I don't know what they did to her, but even Counter maids couldn't touch her.
root.m_Talk_FRA: I don't know what they did to her, but even Counter maids couldn't touch her.

root.m_Talk_ENG: The hag claimed she was the greatest Chief Maid in Mansion's history or whatever...
root.m_Talk_DEU: The hag claimed she was the greatest Chief Maid in Mansion's history or whatever...
root.m_Talk_FRA: The hag claimed she was the greatest Chief Maid in Mansion's history or whatever...

root.m_Talk_ENG: Ugh, whatever! I couldn't care less about maids anymore!
root.m_Talk_DEU: Ugh, whatever! I couldn't care less about maids anymore!
root.m_Talk_FRA: Ugh, whatever! I couldn't care less about maids anymore!

root.m_Talk_ENG: I'm a space explorer from the Northern Union! Not some Mansion flunky...!
root.m_Talk_DEU: I'm a space explorer from the Northern Union! Not some Mansion flunky...!
root.m_Talk_FRA: I'm a space explorer from the Northern Union! Not some Mansion flunky...!

root.m_Talk_ENG: From where I'm standing, it's all the same...
root.m_Talk_DEU: From where I'm standing, it's all the same...
root.m_Talk_FRA: From where I'm standing, it's all the same...

root.m_Talk_ENG: Snowmen or maids... they're both just bad guys.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Snowmen or maids... they're both just bad guys.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Snowmen or maids... they're both just bad guys.

root.m_Talk_ENG: No, they're not! At least the Northern Union never forced us to wear skimpy maid outfits into battle...!
root.m_Talk_DEU: No, they're not! At least the Northern Union never forced us to wear skimpy maid outfits into battle...!
root.m_Talk_FRA: No, they're not! At least the Northern Union never forced us to wear skimpy maid outfits into battle...!

root.m_Talk_ENG: Unlike those perverts...!
root.m_Talk_DEU: Unlike those perverts...!
root.m_Talk_FRA: Unlike those perverts...!

root.m_Talk_ENG: Perverts? Says the one wearing a skin-tight leotard under her uniform...
root.m_Talk_DEU: Perverts? Says the one wearing a skin-tight leotard under her uniform...
root.m_Talk_FRA: Perverts? Says the one wearing a skin-tight leotard under her uniform...

root.m_Talk_ENG: Huh? Hold on a sec. Then have you also worn a maid outfit too?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Huh? Hold on a sec. Then have you also worn a maid outfit too?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Huh? Hold on a sec. Then have you also worn a maid outfit too?

root.m_Talk_ENG: ...Shut it, kid.
root.m_Talk_DEU: ...Shut it, kid.
root.m_Talk_FRA: ...Shut it, kid.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Don't ask questions you don't wanna get hurt for.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Don't ask questions you don't wanna get hurt for.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Don't ask questions you don't wanna get hurt for.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Of course she has. The Mansion's maid uniform is a symbol of trust.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Of course she has. The Mansion's maid uniform is a symbol of trust.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Of course she has. The Mansion's maid uniform is a symbol of trust.

root.m_Talk_ENG: In espionage, assassination, abduction, terrorism, sabotage... trust is everything between the client and us.
root.m_Talk_DEU: In espionage, assassination, abduction, terrorism, sabotage... trust is everything between the client and us.
root.m_Talk_FRA: In espionage, assassination, abduction, terrorism, sabotage... trust is everything between the client and us.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Ugh, you just had to show up. You hag...!
root.m_Talk_DEU: Ugh, you just had to show up. You hag...!
root.m_Talk_FRA: Ugh, you just had to show up. You hag...!

root.m_Talk_ENG: A maid is someone who serves her master to do their bidding.
root.m_Talk_DEU: A maid is someone who serves her master to do their bidding.
root.m_Talk_FRA: A maid is someone who serves her master to do their bidding.

root.m_Talk_ENG: That is why Mansion agents serve their clients as masters.
root.m_Talk_DEU: That is why Mansion agents serve their clients as masters.
root.m_Talk_FRA: That is why Mansion agents serve their clients as masters.

root.m_Talk_ENG: And to make sure they're visible and accountable, they deliberately wear eye-catching maid outfits.
root.m_Talk_DEU: And to make sure they're visible and accountable, they deliberately wear eye-catching maid outfits.
root.m_Talk_FRA: And to make sure they're visible and accountable, they deliberately wear eye-catching maid outfits.

root.m_Talk_ENG: In the underworld, a maid uniform is proof that Mansion is involved, and that anonymity is guaranteed.
root.m_Talk_DEU: In the underworld, a maid uniform is proof that Mansion is involved, and that anonymity is guaranteed.
root.m_Talk_FRA: In the underworld, a maid uniform is proof that Mansion is involved, and that anonymity is guaranteed.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Loyalty and trust toward the client...
root.m_Talk_DEU: Loyalty and trust toward the client...
root.m_Talk_FRA: Loyalty and trust toward the client...

root.m_Talk_ENG: That's the secret to how Mansion has survived all this time.
root.m_Talk_DEU: That's the secret to how Mansion has survived all this time.
root.m_Talk_FRA: That's the secret to how Mansion has survived all this time.

root.m_Talk_ENG: So you're the Mansion Master?
root.m_Talk_DEU: So you're the Mansion Master?
root.m_Talk_FRA: So you're the Mansion Master?

root.m_Talk_ENG: Sysop said you'd be the one to explain our mission.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Sysop said you'd be the one to explain our mission.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Sysop said you'd be the one to explain our mission.

root.m_Talk_FRA: Hmm, your mission...

root.m_Talk_ENG: Let's see...
root.m_Talk_DEU: Let's see...
root.m_Talk_FRA: Let's see...

root.m_Talk_ENG: That scruffy weed over there, I've seen before...
root.m_Talk_DEU: That scruffy weed over there, I've seen before...
root.m_Talk_FRA: That scruffy weed over there, I've seen before...

root.m_Talk_ENG: And this bright-eyed new face... Yes, you must be F959licette. Louis959 Laurencin, right?
root.m_Talk_DEU: And this bright-eyed new face... Yes, you must be F959licette. Louis959 Laurencin, right?
root.m_Talk_FRA: And this bright-eyed new face... Yes, you must be F959licette. Louis959 Laurencin, right?

root.m_Talk_FRA: I saw the Gauntlet League. I'm actually a fan, Louis959.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Huh!? You're a fan of mine?

root.m_Talk_FRA: Huh!? You're a fan of mine?

root.m_Talk_ENG: Don't fall for it, kid.

root.m_Talk_ENG: She's two-faced trash.
root.m_Talk_DEU: She's two-faced trash.
root.m_Talk_FRA: She's two-faced trash.

root.m_Talk_ENG: I can hear you loud and clear, Bristlegrass.
root.m_Talk_DEU: I can hear you loud and clear, Bristlegrass.
root.m_Talk_FRA: I can hear you loud and clear, Bristlegrass.

root.m_Talk_FRA: Hey! Are you saying that I smell?!

root.m_Talk_ENG: Uhu huu. Even your angry face is adorable.

root.m_Talk_FRA: Uhu huu. Even your angry face is adorable.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Still haven't matured enough, but with time, you could become just my type.

root.m_Talk_FRA: Still haven't matured enough, but with time, you could become just my type.

root.m_Talk_FRA: It is my duty as Master to nurture fresh young buds into elegant flowers.

root.m_Talk_FRA: She's still a minor, you know!

root.m_Talk_FRA: What are you saying? Flowers are meant to be nurtured while they're still young buds.

root.m_Talk_FRA: Fu fu, and you're still such a spoiled brat even after all this time.

root.m_Talk_ENG: I bet you missed my touch, didn't you? Still, try to be patient a little longer.

root.m_Talk_FRA: Right now, I'm talking to Louis959. Behave with proper manners as a maid should.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Once we're done here, I'll give you all the attention you've been craving... nice and slow.

root.m_Talk_FRA: Once we're done here, I'll give you all the attention you've been craving... nice and slow.

root.m_Talk_ENG: You're seriously insane...!
root.m_Talk_DEU: You're seriously insane...!
root.m_Talk_FRA: You're seriously insane...!

root.m_Talk_DEU: Hey! Listen up, you damn hag!

root.m_Talk_FRA: Your goal is to get us to that branching point or whatever, right...?

root.m_Talk_FRA: Isn't that why you dragged us all the way out here? To train us for that mission?

root.m_Talk_DEU: Then quit messing around and start training us already!
root.m_Talk_FRA: Then quit messing around and start training us already!

root.m_Talk_FRA: Fu fu, that's pretty eager for a weed like you.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Your mouth's gotten even filthier since I last saw you. Maybe you need a bit of discipline.

root.m_Talk_FRA: Didn't I teach you that a proper maid always speaks with refinement, no matter the place?

root.m_Talk_FRA: My life's already in the gutter. What good's a clean mouth gonna do?

root.m_Talk_FRA: Uhu huu. I've spent my life as Mansion Master, caring for children like you who were tossed aside.
